CustomField.formula:
IF( OR(
ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_1__c, "AWS - (ALH) AUTOMATED LIQUID HANDLING") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_2__c, "AWS - (ALH) AUTOMATED LIQUID HANDLING") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_3__c, "AWS - (ALH) AUTOMATED LIQUID HANDLING"), INCLUDES(Product_Interest__c,"Automated Liquid Handling - AWS"), INCLUDES(Product_Line__c,"AWS"), INCLUDES(BD_Product_Family_Interest__c, "13-AWS")),
"TRUE", "FALSE")
CustomField.label: Summary-AWS
